scene_captions.caption: A large group of sixty-six people moves through the area while carrying six handbags, passing by two chairs and three bowls.
A large group of sixty-six people moves actively through the space, some carrying six handbags, while others are positioned near three bowls and two chairs.
A large group of sixty-six people moves dynamically across the area, some carrying handbags, while chairs and bowls remain relatively stationary in the background.
A large crowd of sixty-six people moves dynamically across the area while carrying handbags, situated near chairs and bowls.

global_caption: This video captured a large, dense crowd of people moving dynamically through a space furnished with seating and small containers. The primary activity involved constant foot traffic as individuals navigated the area, with several people seen carrying personal bags. While the crowd remained in motion, the surrounding furniture and objects stayed stationary in the background, suggesting a busy public thoroughfare or gathering hall.
